text: Tilemaps are 2D level design systems using a grid of reusable tiles — the foundation of classic and modern 2D games (Super Mario, Stardew Valley). Tiles are small images (16x16, 32x32 px) arranged in layers (ground, objects, collision). Tilemap editors: Tiled (industry standard), built-in editors in Unity, Godot, GameMaker.
Isometric tilemaps (2.5D): tiles drawn at 30° angle for pseudo-3D perspective.
